summary: Iteration 17: Menu restructuring and label changes verification complete. All 14 test cases PASSED. Sidebar shows correct groups (Il mio spazio, Scopri, Gestione for admin), subtitle changed to 'Il tuo spazio Ariadne', profile link works, TrainingCoursesPage title/description updated, CourseDetailPage buttons have correct labels, MaterialsPage empty state text updated, CommunityDashboardPage empty events text updated, all navigation links work, no console errors.

issues: Login page still shows 'Scuola e community' subtitle text instead of 'Il tuo spazio Ariadne' - minor branding inconsistency (noted in iteration_16)

critical_code_review_comments: Layout.js correctly restructured navGroups with 3 groups: mio-spazio, scopri, gestione
Layout.js subtitle correctly changed to 'Il tuo spazio Ariadne'
Layout.js profile link 'Il mio profilo →' correctly added under user email
App.js correctly added /profile route with PlaceholderPage
TrainingCoursesPage.js title correctly changed to 'Percorsi formativi'
TrainingCoursesPage.js description correctly updated without admin/editor references
CourseDetailPage.js buttons correctly labeled 'Voglio iscrivermi' and 'Vorrei saperne di più'
MaterialsPage.js empty state correctly shows 'I materiali arriveranno qui' and 'Non appena inizierai il tuo percorso...'
CommunityDashboardPage.js empty events text correctly shows 'Presto troverai qui le prossime occasioni da vivere insieme.'
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 17 verified menu restructuring: (1) Sidebar shows 3 groups for admin: 'Il mio spazio' (Home, Il mio percorso, Materiali), 'Scopri' (Percorsi formativi, Bacheca, Eventi, Ariadne AI), 'Gestione' (Edizioni e materiali, Utenti, Corsi ed eventi, Comunicazioni, Banner), (2) Sidebar subtitle is 'Il tuo spazio Ariadne', (3) Profile link 'Il mio profilo →' visible and navigates to /profile, (4) TrainingCoursesPage title is 'Percorsi formativi', (5) CourseDetailPage buttons are 'Voglio iscrivermi' and 'Vorrei saperne di più', (6) MaterialsPage empty state text updated, (7) CommunityDashboardPage empty events text updated, (8) All navigation links work, (9) No console errors. Minor: LoginPage still shows 'Scuola e community' text.
